title: sarcochilus beckleri
intro: Sarcochilus beckleri, also known as the orchid or Australian orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to eastern Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Sarcochilus beckleri include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sarcochilus beckleri is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is dried and used as a powder in herbal preparations.
